definition:
1. to strike together;  ς. τὼ χεῖρε to clap  the hands for joy, (Xenophon Historicus); but also to smite  them together  in grief, (Lucian):—;Pass. to be applauded , (Xenophon Historicus) 
2. to hammer  or weld together , (Aristophanes Comicus): hence, to weld  a number of men into one body, i. e. organise  them, (Demosthenes Orator), etc.:—;perfect passive participle συγκεκροτημένος well-trained, in good discipline , (Xenophon Historicus) (ML)
